localizations.title: W.A.F.F.'s Odyssey
localizations.hiddenObject_2: There is a hidden number in the landfill (cards 14 and 17).
localizations.hint_1: Did you manage to discern the letters T and V and reveal those cards, despite the shaking? Did you notice that the 3 fell off the machine's number?
localizations.hint_4: The shape of this object seems oddly familiar to you.
localizations.hint_8: You must tame him with some junk from the landfill. Although the can seems like it might work, it is empty. So that leaves either the round rubber object or the strange metal object. Which one might work best?
localizations.hint_11: You will have to fill this empty can at some point during the adventure.
localizations.hint_12: W.A.F.F. can help you better understand this planet.
localizations.hint_13_first: Despite the shaking, were you able to discern the T and V, and reveal those cards?
localizations.hint_13: There are arrows hidden in the screens indicating the directions that need to be entered. You need to view the screens from a distance to see the arrows.
localizations.hint_14: Something seems to be hidden in the dark.
localizations.hint_17_first: Something seems to be hidden in the dark.
localizations.hint_17: Can you see a card with a magnetic stripe?
localizations.hint_20: The initial position of the tablet's pieces taught me the shape for the number 3. By correctly positioning the 4 pieces (by moving and rotating them), I will be able to learn other numbers in W.A.F.F.'s language. I just need to find the shapes that will be useful to me.
localizations.hint_22: Search the landfill for an object that can be swiped through the card reader.
localizations.hint_23_first: Did you notice the broken solar panel pieces on the back of some of the cards?
localizations.hint_23: Correctly assemble the four broken pieces of the solar panel. On the reverse side, the wires will be correctly connected.
localizations.hint_24_first: You must find a way to revive W.A.F.F.!
localizations.hint_24: The color of W.A.F.F.'s eyes, along with that of the smoke coming from him is important. It can help you determine where you need to go next.
localizations.hint_25: You should show this tablet to a native of this planet to decipher it.
localizations.hint_33: Did you notice the conole on his side near his hind legs?
localizations.hint_39: W.A.F.F. is ready to guide you.
localizations.hint_42_first: Did you notice the broken solar panel pieces on the back of some of the cards?
localizations.hint_42: Correctly assemble the four broken pieces of the solar panel. On the reverse side, the wires will be correctly connected.
localizations.hint_43: The printed picture depicts a very warm location with a volcano spewing fire. You could use this location to melt the rubber.
localizations.hint_47: Did you take all 4 panel pieces? Be careful, the first one is upside down.
localizations.hint_49: Position this card on the (C) slot of the 3D stand. Then guide W.A.F.F. through the 3D vessel. You should be able to see colored numbers through the holes. You need to determine the correct sequence for these numbers.
localizations.hint_53: The initial position of the tablet's pieces taught me the shape for the number 3. By correctly positioning the 4 pieces (by moving and rotating them), I will be able to learn other numbers in W.A.F.F.'s language. I just need to find the shapes that will be useful to me.
localizations.hint_58: The initial position of the tablet's pieces taught me the shape for the number 3. By correctly positioning the 4 pieces (by moving and rotating them), I will be able to learn other numbers in W.A.F.F.'s language. I just need to find the shapes that will be useful to me.
localizations.hint_59: Follow W.A.F.F.'s instructions, using the dedicated button.
localizations.hint_60: This material will be useful later in the adventure.
localizations.hint_62: The initial position of the tablet's pieces taught me the shape for the number 3. By correctly positioning the 4 pieces (by moving and rotating them), I will be able to learn other numbers in W.A.F.F.'s language. I just need to find the shapes that will be useful to me.
localizations.hint_64_first: Did you notice the broken solar panel pieces on the back of some of the cards?
localizations.hint_64: Correctly assemble the four broken pieces of the solar panel. On the reverse side, the wires will be correctly connected.
localizations.hint_65: The vessel must be scanned to find all the damage.
localizations.hint_66: Each shape represents either a number or a color. This should help you speak so that W.A.F.F. can understand you (by using a two-digit modifier).
localizations.hint_69: The device requests a facial recognition scan of one of the players.
localizations.hint_70: When taking the spacesuit (97), did you notice the +7 and +9 modifiers, which indicate where to position your feet.  (Make sure you are properly facing the door).
localizations.hint_80_first: Did you notice the broken solar panel pieces on the back of some of the cards?
localizations.hint_80: Correctly assemble the four broken pieces of the solar panel. On the reverse side, the wires will be correctly connected.
localizations.hint_89: Did you orient the card and it's magnetic stripe correctly?
localizations.hint_90: Now that you know the shapes for 1, 2, red, and blue, reproduce the sequences on W.A.F.F.'s console.
localizations.hint_92: Each cell of his battery can hold 1 dose comprising several drops of the purple liquid. W.A.F.F. must be fed with the exact number of drops for each dose.
localizations.hint_95: Seal and caulk the hole with the melted rubber.
localizations.hint_97: Don't get off on the wrong foot before exiting.
localizations.hint_98: You need the antenna from this artifact for your vessel.
localizations.hint_99: Thanks to W.A.F.F.'s story you will be able to find your new destination.
localizations.hint_222: You have found sulfur and the required quantity (+43). However, an equal quantity of clay (heart location) is still missing. So…
localizations.hint_666: This unusually-shaped modifier must be interpreted using W.A.F.F.'s language. Have you unraveled the mystery of the stone tablet (25)?
localizations.hint_waff_step1: WA.F.F. is ready to guide you.
localizations.hint_waff_step2: Each cell of his battery can hold 1 dose comprising several drops of the purple liquid. W.A.F.F. must be fed with the exact number of drops for each dose.
localizations.hint_waff_step3: There are still 2 unexplored areas. Start by placing the various environments you've already explored around the landfill in their proper locations.
localizations.hint_waff_step4: You should be able to see colored numbers through the holes. Follow W.A.F.F.'s tracks to determine the correct sequence. Remember, you'll need to confirm each colored number.
localizations.answer_hint_1: Look at the 3 that fell from the chip. This card (machine) is, in fact, number 13.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Give W.A.F.F. (8) the metal object (4) that is shaped like a bone in order to tame him: 4 + 8 = 12
localizations.answer_hint_8: Give W.A.F.F. (8) the metal object (4) that is shaped like a bone in order to tame him: 4 + 8 = 12
localizations.answer_hint_11: You'll need to combine the can (11), the modifer +57 on the purple card (666), and the exhausted W.A.F.F. (24) to recharge him. As you can see, the purple puzzle piece (666) is peculiar; it must be combined with two other cards, not just one.
localizations.answer_hint_13: On card T, the patterns conceal optical illusions; the upper screen is hiding an arrow pointing to the right, and the lower screen is hiding an arrow pointing to the left. On card V, you can make out an arrow pointing upward on the upper screen, and an arrow pointing to the right on the lower one. You may need to look at the screens from a distance to see the arrows.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Place cards 14 and 17 so that the images complete each other. A hidden number (8) can be seen in the dark space between the two cards, above the growl.
localizations.answer_hint_17: On card T, the patterns conceal optical illusions; the upper screen is hiding an arrow pointing to the right, and the lower screen is hiding an arrow pointing to the left. On card V, you can make out an arrow pointing upward on the upper screen, and an arrow pointing to the right on the lower one. You may need to look at the screens from a distance to see the arrows.
localizations.answer_hint_20: To decipher all the shapes from the tablet, first place cards 53 and 20 facedown, side-by-side, and then place cards 62 and 58 facedown underneath them. By switching their positions and rotating them, you can recreate nine different shapes, each containing a number between 1 and 9. Refer to the solution booklet to see the complete set of shapes.
localizations.answer_hint_22: To unlock the console, you must use the magnetic keycard (89), which you can find hidden somewhere in the landfill (17) and within the deck of cards. The card must be oriented as indicated by the arrowheads on the console (i.e., upside down) to display the correct number (68).
localizations.answer_hint_23: Arrange the backs of cards 23, 42, 64, and 80, aligning the cracks and holes, to see the entire solar panel. Then, flip over the whole panel and you will see that the untangled wires form the number 65.
localizations.answer_hint_24: You must travel to the purple environment. Combine the heart symbol (red) and the droplet symbol (blue) to find the symbol that corresponds to the color purple. Take the card with the droplet symbol inside a heart.
localizations.answer_hint_25: W.A.F.F. (12) can help decipher the stone tablet (25).
localizations.answer_hint_33: There is a code with two symbols on his console. The two triangles mean 22.
localizations.answer_hint_37: Take cards 20, 53, 58, and 62, and arrange them as shown in the picture. You will see a diamond shape with a 3 in its center. Different arrangments of the cards will allow you to decipher all the necessary shapes.
localizations.answer_hint_39: Press the dedicated W.A.F.F. button. He will then guide you to the location with clay. The heart he is showing you means you must take the card showing the heart symbol.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Arrange the backs of cards 23, 42, 64, and 80, aligning the cracks and holes, to see the entire solar panel. Then, flip over the whole panel and you will see that the wires form the number 65.
localizations.answer_hint_43: On the printed picture, you can see half of an oddly-shaped red modifier. To see the full modifier, place card 43 behind the heart card to see the fire-spewing volcano on top of the mountain. Use the stone tablet (25) to translate the shapes into numbers.
localizations.answer_hint_49: You can see colored numbers through the holes by placing card 49 on the vessel's 3D stand. Go to the solution for W.A.F.F.'s dedicated button for further details.
localizations.answer_hint_53: To decipher all the shapes from the tablet, first place cards 53 and 20 facedown, side-by-side, and then place cards 62 and 58 facedown underneath them. By switching their positions and rotating them, you can recreate nine different shapes, each containing a number between 1 and 9. Refer to the solution booklet to see the complete set of shapes.
localizations.answer_hint_58: To decipher all the shapes from the tablet, first place cards 53 and 20 facedown, side-by-side, and then place cards 62 and 58 facedown underneath them. By switching their positions and rotating them, you can recreate nine different shapes, each containing a number between 1 and 9. Refer to the solution booklet to see the complete set of shapes.
localizations.answer_hint_59: Point your device toward the two unexplored locations. To the northwest, you'll get the shape corresponding to 9, and to the southwest you'll get the shape corresponding to 8.
localizations.answer_hint_60: Combine the rubber (60) with the red modifier (+35) on the combination of cards 43 and the heart card to obtain melted rubber.
localizations.answer_hint_62: To decipher all the shapes from the tablet, first place cards 53 and 20 facedown, side-by-side, and then place cards 62 and 58 facedown underneath them. By switching their positions and rotating them, you can recreate nine different shapes, each containing a number between 1 and 9. Refer to the solution booklet to see the complete set of shapes.
localizations.answer_hint_64: Arrange the backs of cards 23, 42, 64, and 80, aligning the cracks and holes, to see the entire solar panel. Then, flip over the whole panel and you will see that the wires form the number 65.
localizations.answer_hint_65: Scan card 47 to get a full damage report.
localizations.answer_hint_66: This is what W.A.F.F. is trying to tell you: the circle means 1, the triangle means 2, the heart means red, and the droplet means blue. The modifier on the card is therefore +21. Reply to W.A.F.F. (12) by adding the red modifier.
localizations.answer_hint_69: Scan the face of a player to continue.
localizations.answer_hint_70: To exit the vessel, you must use the modifiers on the tips of your boots (97). Put the spacesuit on (90), and face the exit (70); this will align the boots with the correct modifiers. Add the +8 on the right foot with the +9 on the floor, and the +7 on the left foot with the +7 on the floor. This will give you cards 17 and 14, respectively.
localizations.answer_hint_80: Arrange the backs of cards 23, 42, 64, and 80, aligning the cracks and holes, to see the entire solar panel. Then, flip over the whole panel and you will see that the wires form the number 65.
localizations.answer_hint_89: To unlock the console, you need to orient the keycard correctly. The card will be upside-down, so the number 89 becomes 68. Combine this number with W.A.F.F.'s console (22).
localizations.answer_hint_90:
Here are the responses you must give to the five sequences in order to confirm you've learned the first signs: 
1/ Red. 
2/ Red and blue. 
3/ Red, blue, and 2. 
4/ Red, blue, 2, and 1. 
5/ Red, blue, 2, 1, and blue.
localizations.answer_hint_92: To refill each cell, you must give W.A.F.F. a specific number of drops by touching his mouth. For the first dose, give him 8 drops; for the second, 4 drops; and for the third, 6 drops.
localizations.answer_hint_95: Slide your finger along the crack to caulk it.
localizations.answer_hint_97: To exit the vessel, you must use the modifiers on the tips of your boots (97). Put the spacesuit on (90), and face the exit (70); this will align the boots with the correct modifiers. Add the +8 on the right foot with the +9 on the floor, and the +7 on the left foot with the +7 on the floor. This will give you cards 17 and 14, respectively.
localizations.answer_hint_98: To affix the antenna onto your vessel, add the +65 modifier to the ship's hull (the card with the caulked crack)(34).
localizations.answer_hint_99: In box 6 of W.A.F.F.'s story, the two constellations form shapes that can be deciphered with the code on card Z. They form a 6 and a 9.
localizations.answer_hint_222: Equal amounts of clay (+43) and sulfur (+43) are required.
localizations.answer_hint_666: You'll need to combine the can (11), the modifer +57 on the purple card (666), and the exhausted W.A.F.F. (24) to recharge him. As you can see, the purple puzzle piece (666) is peculiar; it must be combined with two other cards, not just one.
localizations.answer_hint_waff_step1: The heart he is showing you means you must take the card with the heart symbol.
localizations.answer_hint_waff_step2: To refill each cell, you must give W.A.F.F. a specific number of drops by touching his mouth. For the first dose, give him 8 drops; for the second, 4 drops; and for the third, 6 drops.
localizations.answer_hint_waff_step3: Point your device toward the two unexplored locations. To the northwest, you'll get the shape corresponding to 9, and to the southwest youll get the shape corresponding to 8.
localizations.answer_hint_waff_step4: On the pad, enter the codes in the following order (using the shapes in W.A.F.F.'s language for the numbers): 9 + heart, 8 + droplet inside sun, 2 + droplet.
localizations.machine_1: There is no machine 1. I was in so much of a hurry that I must have gotten it wrong.
localizations.machine_13: After the crash landing, everything was suddenly calm on the vessel.
localizations.machine_90: Enough playing with W.A.F.F.; he needs rest. You can now use the dedicated W.A.F.F. button on your device. The little robot will help you several times during the adventure.
localizations.machine_11111: Hooray! W.A.F.F. managed to repair the vessel!
localizations.machine_waff_39: W.A.F.F. seems to be guiding you to a location.
localizations.machine_waff_34: W.A.F.F. is lying on the ground, motionless. Purple smoke is emanating from him.
localizations.machine_waff_92: Give W.A.F.F. the right doses to recharge each cell of the battery.
localizations.machine_waff_92_success: W.A.F.F.'s energy levels are at full capacity. His battery is now recharged.
localizations.machine_waff_59_instructions_1: Place the environment cards as shown in the picture.
localizations.machine_waff_59_instructions_2: Hold your device above the landfill and point it toward the north (droplet card).
localizations.machine_waff_59_instructions_3: Pivot your device like a compass to find the unexplored locations.
localizations.machine_waff_59_instructions_3_nogyro: Move W.A.F.F. along the compass to find the unexplored locations.
localizations.machine_waff_H_instructions: W.A.F.F. is positioned at this location. Follow his tracks through the vessel.
localizations.machine_65_result:
The scanner
has detected some damage.
